name: customer_crud
description: CRUD operations for the Sports2000 Customer table. action=list (filter by name/country/salesRep, returns up to maxRows), action=get (by custNum, all fields), action=create (requires name), action=update (requires custNum, updates only supplied fields), action=delete (requires custNum).

name.description: Customer name (partial filter for list, value for create/update)

country.description: Country (exact filter for list, value for create/update)

salesRep.description: Sales rep code (exact filter for list, value for create/update)

maxRows.description: Max rows returned by list, default 100
